results.rendered_html: anurāga (von rañj mit anu) m. Zuneigung (Gegens. aparāga)  H. 296 . praṇādastu śabdaḥ syādanurāgajaḥ  AK. 1,1,5,11 . sthirānurāga  R. 3,3,4 . Das subj. im gen.  M. 7,154 .  R. 5,19,26 . 66,3 . 6,97,3 . das obj. im loc.: kaṇṭakitena [Page1-0216] prathayati mayyanurāgaṃ kapolena  ŚĀK. 63 . na khalu satyameva tāpasakanyakāyāmanurāgo me  ŚĀK. CH. 41,13 . geht im comp. voran: priyānurāgasya  RAGH. 3,10 . kathānurāgaḥ das Wohlgefallen an Erzählungen  HIT. 27,16 , v. l. Am Ende eines comp. f. ā  R. 2,12,98  (bhāryāḥ kṛtānurāgāḥ).  AK. 3,4,76  (atyarthānurāgāyāṃ ca yoṣiti).

results.rendered_html:
anurāga a. Become red, reddened.
— gaḥ
1 Redness.
2 Devotion, attachment, contentment, loyalty (opp. aparāgaḥ); love, affection, passion (with loc. or in comp.); āvirbhūtānurāgāḥ  Mu. 4. 21 ; kaṃṭakitena prathayati mayyanurāgaṃ kapolena  Ś. 3. 15 ;  R. 3. 10 ; ˚iṃgitaṃ a gesture or external sign expressive of love; prasādastu śabdaḥ syādanurāgajaḥ  Ak.
